channel.title: Migaki
channel.description: Updates for Migaki — clean, focused video, audio, and GIF transcoding.

item.title: Version 2.0
item.description:
Migaki 2.0

A new transcoding pipeline, a guided tour of the real interface, and a fresh look you can make your own.

  • UI Tour — a brand-new interactive guided tour that walks you through Migaki's real interface.
  • Synthetic Repair — a new transcoding pipeline that synthesizes frames to repair them, with an Analyzer that auto-scans your source and tells you whether repair is needed before you toggle it
  • Appearance Effects — Pick your favorite effect to compliment your window layout, or swap on the fly from the new wand icon in the toolbar
  • Welcome Tour rebuilt from the ground up as a three-slide experience showcasing the perks of using Migaki
  • Trim Editor — added 30s and 45s quick trim presets, plus drag the whole trim selection from anywhere on the timeline

item.title: Version 1.6
item.description:
Migaki 1.6

Focused audio sync improvements.

  • Smart Routing — Index-Based Timestamp Sync is now reserved for short clips where it shines. Longer transcodes are routed to Standard Timestamp Sync so audio sync stays rock solid end-to-end.

item.title: Version 1.5
item.description:
Migaki 1.5

Smarter routing decisions and richer source analysis.

  • Smart Routing — improved metric recognition for choosing how a video is transcoded
  • Source Analysis — richer metadata pulled from your source files for more accurate detailed reports and precise frame-rate detection

item.title: Version 1.4
item.description:
Migaki 1.4

Fixes a critical transcoding bug and polishes the queue icons.

  • Critical fix: Index-Based Timestamp Sync no longer drifts audio behind video on long or trimmed sources — picture and sound stay locked end-to-end
  • Queue icon polish: hover-scale is now consistent across all queue row icons

item.title: Version 1.3
item.description:
Migaki 1.3

Smarter transcoding — the engine now reads your source and picks the right method automatically.

  • Frame Dropping — a new transcoding method for downsampling (60 → 24, 52 → 30) that picks the closest real source frames instead of synthesizing new ones; dramatically faster than Motion Interpolation. VFR sources are auto-detected and routed to Motion Interpolation instead, since their irregular timing wouldn't smooth well under frame drop
  • Index-Based Timestamp Sync — a new behind-the-scenes variant of Timestamp Sync that catches bursty sources where two source frames would land in the same target slot, assigns every source frame to its own clean slot, and re-paces audio to match
  • Fixed a bug in Voice and Time Preservation where having the Audio Sync setting on at the same time could silently shorten the output duration

item.title: Version 1.2
item.description:
Migaki 1.2

Deep diagnostics, richer reports, and a rebuilt Welcome Tour.

  • VFR Deep Analysis — a new side-by-side sheet inside the Video Quality Report comparing source vs output frame-by-frame, with a shareable copy-ready report
  • Audio Editor's new Audio Info bubble surfaces sample rate, channels, codec, and file size at a glance
  • Quality Reports refreshed across Video, Audio, and GIF — original vs new file size, real audio properties straight from the file, and a reorganized Video report
  • Welcome Tour rebuilt as a practical, screenshot-driven walkthrough

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
Migaki 1.1

Polish, polish, and a fresh tour of what Migaki does best.

  • Refreshed Welcome Tour with new pages for Drop In Ready, Voice and Time Preservation, Quality Verified, and Edit While the Queue Runs
  • Redesigned License page with live device counts pulled from your license
  • One-click promo code shortcuts throughout the app

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
Welcome to Migaki 1.0

The first public release of Migaki — fast, frame-accurate transcoding for video, audio, and GIF.

  • Smart frame rate handling for variable frame rate footage
  • Editor-ready output with constant frame rate and dense keyframes
  • Voice and Time Preservation for screen recordings
  • Dedicated GIF editor with full control over frame rate, dimensions, and speed
